• Creates a procedurally generated mining world with tile‑based terrain, ore distribution, and a day/night cycle.
  • Implements player controls (movement, drilling, building, AOE mining, teleports, chat, admin panel) and a HUD with configurable gauge styles.
  • Provides a shop, inventory, save system, cloud sync, custom texture support, and a modular modal system for prompts, forms, and trading.
    Game.init();
    Shop.buy('drill');

This script builds a minimalist multiplayer mining game where players explore a seeded map, collect resources, and upgrade their vehicle. The engine handles rendering, physics, networking, sound, and UI, while the Shop and Save modules manage in‑game transactions and persistence. Custom textures and a flexible modal system let developers extend the experience without altering core logic.
